member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.RegisterWeaponHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the RegisterWeaponHelper for sending a RegisterWeapon
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the RegisterWeapon
to.
member.remarks: Use this message to register weapon. This is an alternativeto the registerWeapon public function.
